resources.string: No routing data. Download a .pbf file first.
Routing engine failed to start. Try restarting the app. If this repeats, re-download routing data.
Routing index is still loading — your route will appear automatically when ready.
No offline tiles. Download tiles for this region first.
Location permission is required for ride recording.
GPS active — press record to start a ride
Routing data downloaded! Download Eastern PA map tiles for offline map use? (~30 MB)
Standard and cycle map tiles are ready for offline use.
Offline navigation is set up. Routing will be instant.
This takes a few minutes. You\'ll be notified when done.

My Cycle Mania will now set up offline navigation for Eastern PA:

• Download map tiles (standard + cycle map)
• Download Pennsylvania routing data (~120 MB)
• Run a quick test route to warm up the engine

You'll get a notification when everything is ready. You can lock your screen — downloads continue in the background.

My Cycle Mania is a passion project built for fun, personal entertainment, and a love of exploring the open road on two wheels.

It grew out of a curiosity for how offline mapping and bicycle routing technology actually work under the hood — combining OpenStreetMap's incredible community-built road network with GraphHopper's open-source routing engine to deliver fully offline, turn-by-turn cycling navigation right on your phone. No accounts. No cloud. No data plan required once you're set up.

Whether you're discovering new back roads through the countryside, tracking your weekend rides, or just geeking out on how the tech works — this app was made for riders like you. It is not a commercial product, carries no warranties or guarantees of accuracy, and is provided as-is for personal use only. Always ride safely, know your route, and use good judgment on the road.

This app is free and always will be. It was built in spare time with no budget and no corporate backing — just a cyclist, a keyboard, and way too much coffee.\n\nIf My Cycle Mania has made a ride more fun, helped you discover a new route, or just given you something cool to tinker with, consider buying me a coffee. Every little bit goes toward keeping the lights on, the caffeine flowing, and maybe adding a feature or two.
(Opens the Google Play Store — no account needed)

Built by KC3SMW
Powered by OpenStreetMap contributors
Routing by GraphHopper
Maps by OSMDroid
